creator: Theresa Loconsolo
title: (No AI) The leaderboard “you can’t game,” funded by the companies it ranks
dc:creator: Theresa Loconsolo
content: Artificial intelligence models are multiplying fast, and competition is stiff. With so many players crowding the space, which one will be the best — and who decides that? Arena, formerly LM Arena, has emerged as the de facto public leaderboard for frontier LLMs, influencing funding, launches, and PR cycles. In just seven months, the startup went from a UC Berkeley PhD research \[…\]

title: (No AI) DLSS 5: Has Nvidia’s AI graphics technology gone too far?
author: Richard Lawler
content:
![DLSS 5 comparison image of Resident Evil Requiem](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/03/screencapture-nvidia-en-us-geforce-news-dlss5-breakthrough-in-visual-fidelity-for-games-nvidia-dlss-5-resident-evil-requiem-geforce-rtx-comparison-screenshot-001-2026-03-17-20_21_56.png?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

Nvidia has revealed a new “3D guided neural rendering model” called DLSS 5 that can change a game’s lighting and materials in real-time, and… many gamers aren’t happy. From DLSS 5 [memes](https://bsky.app/profile/amanita-design.net/post/3mhawmtv44c2e) to [complaints](https://bsky.app/profile/mikebithell.bsky.social/post/3mh7f6vgrfc2s) about how it’s “yassified” _Resident Evil Requiem_ characters in demos, the first impression has not been a good one, no matter how much Nvidia [insists](https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/geforce/forums/rtx-technology-dlss-dxr/37/583738/dlss-5-faq/) that this pursuit of photorealism is still honoring the original artists’ intent.

_Follow along below for all the latest updates about Nvidia’s DLSS 5 upgrades_.

*   [Nvidia has lost the plot with gamers](https://www.theverge.com/games/895753/nvidia-dlss-5-slop-face-fake-frames)
*   [Jensen Huang, on the critical reaction to DLSS 5: “Well, first of all, they’re completely wrong.”](https://www.theverge.com/games/896457/jensen-huang-on-the-critical-reaction-to-dlss-5-well-first-of-all-theyre-completely-wrong)
*   [Nvidia’s DLSS 5 is like motion smoothing for video games, but worse](https://www.theverge.com/entertainment/896213/nvidia-dlss-5-ai-faces-motion-smoothing)
*   [DLSS 5 looks like a real-time generative AI filter for video games](https://www.theverge.com/news/895472/nvidia-dlss5-generative-ai-pc-graphics)
*   [Nvidia just announced DLSS 5 and Digital Foundry already has a video.](https://www.theverge.com/tech/895421/nvidia-just-announced-dlss-5-and-digital-foundry-already-has-a-video)
contentSnippet:
Nvidia has revealed a new “3D guided neural rendering model” called DLSS 5 that can change a game’s lighting and materials in real-time, and… many gamers aren’t happy. From DLSS 5 memes to complaints about how it’s “yassified” Resident Evil Requiem characters in demos, the first impression has not been a good one, no matter how much Nvidia insists that this pursuit of photorealism is still honoring the original artists’ intent.
Follow along below for all the latest updates about Nvidia’s DLSS 5 upgrades.

Nvidia’s DLSS 5 is like motion smoothing for video games, but worse

Nvidia just announced DLSS 5 and Digital Foundry already has a video.

From DLSS 5 memes to complaints about how it’s “yassified” Resident Evil Requiem characters in demos, the first impression has not been a good one, no matter […]

title: (No AI) Nvidia’s DLSS 5 is like motion smoothing for video games, but worse
author: Andrew Webster
content:
![A screenshot of Starfield with DLSS 5 on.](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/03/Screenshot-2026-03-17-at-1.29.30%E2%80%AFPM.png?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

Yesterday [Nvidia revealed its latest upscaling tech, called DLSS 5](https://www.theverge.com/news/895472/nvidia-dlss5-generative-ai-pc-graphics), which [it described](https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/geforce/news/dlss5-breakthrough-in-visual-fidelity-for-games/) as "the company's most significant breakthrough in computer graphics since the debut of real-time ray tracing in 2018." Sounds good, until you actually see it. According to Nvidia, the tech "infuses pixels with photoreal lighting and materials," but all anyone seemed to notice was that it turned recognizable faces into something resembling AI slop. _Resident Evil Requiem_ protagonist Grace [got a makeover](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MhLWH18vXH4) that would make her look at home in [a Tilly Norwood video](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/791680/tilly-norwood-particle6-xicoia-eline-van-der-velden). The _Hogwarts Legacy_ kids [looked like they'd been wrung through an Instagram filter](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=t50AdVMuxZE). Even Liverpoo …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/entertainment/896213/nvidia-dlss-5-ai-faces-motion-smoothing)

Sounds good, until you actually see it. According to Nvidia, the tech "infuses pixels with photoreal lighting and materials," but all anyone seemed to notice was that it turned recognizable faces into something resembling AI slop. Resident Evil Requiem protagonist Grace got a makeover that would make her look at home in a Tilly Norwood video. The Hogwarts Legacy kids looked like they'd been wrung through an Instagram filter. Even Liverpoo …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: (No AI) Introducing GPT-5.4 mini and nano
content: GPT-5.4 mini and nano are smaller, faster versions of GPT-5.4 optimized for coding, tool use, multimodal reasoning, and high-volume API and sub-agent workloads.

creator: Paresh Dave
title: (No AI) Justice Department Says Anthropic Can’t Be Trusted With Warfighting Systems
dc:creator: Paresh Dave
content: In response to Anthropic’s lawsuit, the government said it lawfully penalized the company for trying to limit how its Claude AI models could be used by the military.

title: (No AI) How Invisalign Became the World’s Biggest User of 3D Printers
